use_cases: Form submission triggers and user interactions
Accessible button with multiple visual variants
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot, class-variance-authority, and Tailwind CSS. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes proper focus-visible states, ring offsets, and disabled states for accessibility. This atomic component serves as a foundational UI building block for any web application, from form submissions to navigation triggers.
